chapter_title.en: HADEETH OF THE FUQAHA (JURISTS) AND THE ULAMA (SCHOLARS)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 483)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 483)
text: شَدَّ عَلِيٌّ (عليه السلام) عَلَى بَطْنِهِ يَوْمَ الْجَمَلِ بِعِقَالٍ أَبْرَقَ نَزَلَ بِهِ جَبْرَئِيلُ (عليه السلام) مِنَ السَّمَاءِ وَ كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ (صلى الله عليه وآله) يَشُدُّ بِهِ عَلَى بَطْنِهِ إِذَا لَبِسَ الدِّرْعَ.

en.hubeali: H 14960 – Aban, from Yaqoub Bin Shuayb, who has said:

Abu Abdullahasws has said: ‘Aliasws tightened a glimmering belt around hisasws abdomen on the Day of Al-Jamal which Jibraeelas had descended with from the sky, and the Rasool Allahsaww used to wear it around hissaww abdomen whenever hesaww wore the armour’.
en.sarwar: 513. Aban, from Al-Fazeyl Bin Yasaar, who has said: Abu Ja’far (a.s.) has said: ‘Usman said to Al-Miqdad (ar), ‘By Allah (azwj), stop insulting me or I will return you (ar) to your (ar) First Lord (azwj)’. He (a.s.) said: ‘So when the death presented itself to Al-Miqdad (ar), he (ar) said to Ammar, ‘Make it reach to Usman from me (ar) that I (ar) have returned to my (ar) First Lord (azwj)’.
